name: Ronnie Hutchins

contactInfo.office: 120 E. Main St., Mount Vernon, TX 75457

bio: Ronnie Hutchins serves as the Mayor of Mount Vernon, the county seat of Franklin County. Mount Vernon is a quiet East Texas community known for its friendly residents and proximity to Lake Cypress Springs. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to maintain quality city services.
campaignPromises: Promote Lake Cypress Springs tourism and recreation
Support local businesses and economic development
Maintain affordable and efficient city services
